data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Pay stub generation with earnings breakdown', but the evidence provided does not include any specific details or outputs related to pay stub generation. While the linked use case mentions that the system generates pay stubs, there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that the pay stubs include an earnings breakdown or that this functionality has been tested. Therefore, there is a clear gap in the evidence regarding this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of pay stub generation with earnings breakdown.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
